title: Google Summer of Code Contributor Program
snippet: Google Summer of Code is a global, online program focused on bringing new contributors into open source software development. GSoC Contributors work with an open source organization on a 12+ week programming project under the guidance of mentors.

title: Nokia Software Designer Intern/Co-op
snippet: Nokia is seeking a Software Designer Intern/Co-op for a hybrid role in Ottawa, ON, Canada, for the Summer 2026 term (May 4 - August 28, 2026). This position is for 2nd year+ Master's or Bachelor's degree candidates in Engineering/Computer Science, focusing on software design, testing, and defect investigation.
